## Patient dosing summary

| Patient ID | Age (months) | Weight (kg) | Dose (mg/kg) | Calculated Dose (mg) | Frequency | Next Dose | PK Clearance (mL/min) | Notes |

| CU-002 | 18 | 9.1 | 0.12 | 1.09 | q3w | 2026-04-12 | 2.8 | Responding well. Weight gain improving. |
| CU-003 | 51 | 15.7 | 0.18 | 2.83 | q2w | 2026-04-10 | 4.1 | New enrollment. First dose administered 2026-03-27. |

## Quick assessment

Current PK-guided dosing parameters appear internally consistent across all three compassionate-use patients. No obvious anomalies are present in the latest config. Clinical notes suggest:

- **CU-001:** Stable with measurable tumor regression
- **CU-002:** Responding well with improving weight gain
- **CU-003:** Newly enrolled; early treatment phase, so trend stability is still being established

Overall, nothing in the latest dosing file suggests an immediate PK stability issue, though CU-003 should continue to be monitored closely given recent initiation.
